languages.original_text: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."

languages.text: "Я ценю внимательных слушателей. И все же нам пора завершать эту встречу".
languages.translation_comment:
Тразин
В начале куя исчезает и появляется в новом месте — прямо перед игроком

Тразин
В начале куя исчезает и появляется в новом месте — прямо перед игроком

languages.text: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."
languages.original_text: "Я ценю внимательных слушателей. И все же нам пора завершать эту встречу".

traits.locale_text: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."
"I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."
"I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."

languages.text: 「熱心に耳を傾けてくれる聴衆には感謝している。しかし、この出会いを締めくくる時が来たようだ」
languages.original_text: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."

traits.locale_text: 「熱心に耳を傾けてくれる聴衆には感謝しています。しかし、この出会いを締めくくる時が来たようです。」

languages.text: “有你们这么投入的观众，我确实很受用。不过，是时候结束这场会面了。”
languages.original_text: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."

traits.locale_text: “有你们这么投入的观众，我确实很受用。不过，是时候结束这场会面了。”

languages.text: «Agradezco que mi público esté tan cautivado, pero es hora de poner fin a este encuentro».
languages.original_text: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."

traits.locale_text: «Agradezco que mi público esté tan cautivado, pero es hora de poner fin a este encuentro».

languages.text: "Ich weiß ein begeistertes Publikum zu schätzen. Aber es wird Zeit, diese Begegnung zu beenden."
languages.original_text: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß ein begeistertes Publikum zu schätzen. Aber es wird Zeit, diese Begegnung zu beenden."

languages.text: « J'aime que le public m'accorde toute son attention. Cependant, il est temps de baisser le rideau sur cette rencontre. »
languages.original_text: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."

traits.locale_text: « J'aime que le public m'accorde toute son attention. Cependant, il est temps de baisser le rideau sur cette rencontre. »

languages.text: "Kendinden geçmiş bir izleyici kitlesini gerçekten takdir ederim. Yine de bu karşılaşmayı sona erdirme zamanı geldi."
languages.original_text: "I do appreciate a rapt audience. Yet it is time to bring this encounter to a close."

traits.locale_text: "Kendinden geçmiş bir izleyici kitlesini gerçekten takdir ederim. Yine de bu karşılaşmayı sona erdirme zamanı geldi."
